name: Southland Holdings, Inc.
business: Southland is a diverse leader in specialty infrastructure construction, designing and constructing projects in bridges, tunnels, communications, data centers, transportation, marine, steel structures, water and wastewater treatment, and water pipelines. Its customers are a mixture of public entities (federal agencies, state departments of transportation, local transit authorities, county and city public works departments, utilities) and private owners of industrial, commercial, and residential sites. The company operates through two segments: Civil (water pipelines, water treatment, tunneling) and Transportation (bridges, roadways, marine, special structures).
sellsTo: public entities: federal agencies, state departments of transportation, local transit authorities, county and city public works departments, utilities
private: owners of industrial, commercial, and residential sites
end markets: bridges, tunnels, communications, data centers, transportation and facilities, marine, steel structures, water and wastewater treatment, water pipelines

exposures.sentence: We design and construct projects in the bridges, tunnels, communications, data centers, transportation and facilities, marine, steel structures, water and wastewater treatment, and water pipelines end markets.

We design and construct projects in the bridges, tunnels, communications, data centers, transportation and facilities, marine, steel structures, water and wastewater treatment, and water pipelines end markets.
Southland is a diverse leader in specialty infrastructure construction with roots dating back to 1900.

catalysts.sentence: On December 17, 2025, the Company appointed Nick Campbell as the Chief Transformation Officer (CTO) pursuant to an engagement letter with Meru, LLC (Meru) dated as of December 17, 2025.

catalysts.event: Adverse ruling on Washington State Convention Center Project
catalysts.sentence: On December 1, 2025, we received an adverse ruling in the case of American Bridge Company v. Clark/Lewis Joint Venture, et al. relating to the construction of the Washington State Convention Center Project (the WSCC Ruling).

catalysts.event: Assignment and Assumption Agreement for Credit Agreement
catalysts.sentence: On March 16, 2026, the Company entered into an assignment and assumption agreement (the Assignment and Assumption Agreement) with Callodine Commercial Finance, LLC (the Resigning Agent), solely in its capacity as Agent under the Credit Agreement, lenders party to the Credit Agreement (individually, an Assignor, and collectively, the Assignors), the assignees parties thereto (individually, an Assignee, and collectively, the Assignees), and Alana Porrazzo, in her capacity as Trustee of the Southland Collateral Trust, as successor agent.

catalysts.event: Sureties assume lender positions and waive defaults
catalysts.sentence: On March 17, 2026, certain sureties assumed the lender positions under the Company’s Credit Agreement and waived all potential defaults and covenant violations.

catalysts.event: Surety forbearance on WSCC settlement repayment
catalysts.sentence: The sureties agreed to forbear on seeking repayment of any settlement related to WSCC Ruling until at least March 27, 2027.
